---
title: "AQ 224 -- Plankton Systematics and Ecology"
subtitle: "Assignment: Harmful Algal Blooms (HABs)"
date: "2026-05-28"
author: "Nyamisi Peter"
format: 
    revealjs:
      standalone: true
      embed-resources: true
      reference-location: document
      theme: serif
      highlight-style: ayu-mirage
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  comment: ""

slide-number: true
theme: "journal"
code-fold: false
scrollable: true
code-line-numbers: true
bibliography: ../plankton.bib
csl: ../havard.csl
css: ../styles.css
---


Prepare a power point presentation on Harmful Algal Blooms (HABs). Focus on the causes, organisms/species involved, consequences, and management strategies to mitigate their impacts on marine ecosystems. For each group, show a specific case study of the event

+ Group1 -- Focus on Brown Tides
+ Group2 -- Focus on Red Tides
+ Group3 -- Focus on Green Tides
